name: Guest666 x Noob( After the incident, forsaken.)
description: Pre-Forsaken Guest 666 wears a black and red jacket with brown fur hood collar, as well as black pants, and the Red Roblox Cap. They have grey instead of pure black skin. This is confirmed by Milestone I Noob Render.Guest 666 has a pitch-black head, a black cap with a red brim with an "R" on it, and "Roblox" written across their torso and arms. Their hands and claws are a bright red with a black outline seemingly made out of solid material to resemble chains,[5] their horns are bright red and lyre-shaped, his legs are unguligrade, and their hooves have a red "flame" effect. They also have a large dark red "mane," and a bright red tail with the Roblox logo at the tip of it. Most of Guest 666's body has the fluffy and their kneecaps are spheres with a fluffy rim above them. Guest 666 also has a red face, with a large mouth that makes a creepy smile, black teeth, and wide, red, seemingly bleeding or eyes.
creator: Prushkaaa4ka
